translations.en: When I get there, I eat breakfast at home.
translations.fr: Quand j’arrive, je prends le petit-déjeuner à la maison.
translations.de: Wenn ich ankomme, frühstücke ich zu Hause.
translations.it: Quando arrivo, faccio colazione a casa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我到了以后在家吃早餐。
translations.yue: 我到咗之後，就喺屋企食早餐。
translations.ru: Когда я прихожу, я завтракаю дома.
translations.pt: Quando chego, tomo café da manhã em casa.
translations.he: כשאני מגיע, אני אוכל ארוחת בוקר בבית.
translations.vi: Khi tôi đến, tôi ăn sáng ở nhà.
translations.ar: عندما أصل، أتناول الفطور في المنزل.
translations.nl: Als ik aankom, ontbijt ik thuis.
translations.uk: Коли я приходжу, я снідаю вдома.
translations.hi: जब मैं पहुँचता हूँ, तो मैं घर पर नाश्ता करता हूँ।
translations.pl: Kiedy przychodzę, jem śniadanie w domu.
translations.el: Όταν φτάνω, παίρνω πρωινό στο σπίτι.
translations.nb: Når jeg kommer, spiser jeg frokost hjemme.
translations.id: Saat saya tiba, saya sarapan di rumah.
translations.sv: När jag kommer, äter jag frukost hemma.
translations.ro: Când ajung, iau micul dejun acasă.
translations.da: Når jeg kommer, spiser jeg morgenmad derhjemme.
translations.ja: 着いたら、家で朝ごはんを食べます。

tokens.explanation: Subordinating conjunction introducing a temporal clause.
Finite verb in first person singular present indicative.
Finite verb in first person singular present indicative.
Adposition introducing a prepositional phrase.
Common noun functioning as the object of the preposition.

translations.en: I call you when I finish.
translations.de: Ich rufe dich an, wenn ich fertig bin.
translations.vi: Tôi gọi cho bạn khi tôi xong.
translations.nl: Ik bel je als ik klaar ben.
translations.hi: जब मैं खत्म कर लूँगा, तो मैं तुम्हें फोन करूँगा।
translations.nb: Jeg ringer deg når jeg er ferdig.
translations.id: Saya menelepon Anda ketika saya selesai.
translations.sv: Jag ringer dig när jag är klar.
translations.da: Jeg ringer til dig, når jeg er færdig.
translations.ja: 終わったら電話するよ。

tokens.explanation: Clitic personal pronoun functioning as indirect/direct object depending on context; here clitic attached to the verb phrase.
Finite verb in first person singular present indicative.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a temporal clause.
Finite verb in first person singular present indicative.

translations.en: We leave when it starts to rain.
translations.fr: Nous partons quand il commence à pleuvoir.
translations.de: Wir gehen, wenn es anfängt zu regnen.
translations.zh-Hans: 开始下雨时，我们就出门。
translations.pt: Nós saímos quando começa a chover.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi rời đi khi trời bắt đầu mưa.
translations.nl: We vertrekken als het begint te regenen.
translations.uk: Ми виходимо, коли починає йти дощ.
translations.hu: Elindulunk, amikor elkezd esni az eső.
translations.hi: जब बारिश शुरू होती है, तो हम निकल जाते हैं।
translations.nb: Vi går når det begynner å regne.
translations.sv: Vi går när det börjar regna.
translations.da: Vi går, når det begynder at regne.
translations.ja: 雨が降り始めたら、私たちは出ます。

tokens.explanation: Finite verb in first person plural present indicative.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a temporal clause.
Finite verb in third person singular present indicative.
Preposition marking the infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb in a periphrastic construction after the preposition 'a'.

translations.en: My brother sleeps when it rains.
translations.fr: Mon frère dort quand il pleut.
translations.de: Mein Bruder schläft, wenn es regnet.
translations.ko: 비가 올 때 내 남동생은 잔다.
translations.yue: 落雨嗰陣，我細佬喺度瞓覺。
translations.ru: Мой брат спит, когда идет дождь.
translations.vi: Em trai tôi ngủ khi trời mưa.
translations.nl: Mijn broer slaapt als het regent.
translations.uk: Мій брат спить, коли йде дощ.
translations.hu: A bátyám akkor alszik, amikor esik az eső.
translations.hi: मेरा भाई बारिश होने पर सोता है।
translations.pl: Mój brat śpi, როცა pada deszcz.
translations.el: Ο αδερφός μου κοιμάται όταν βρέχει.
translations.nb: Broren min sover når det regner.
translations.id: Saudara laki-laki saya tidur saat hujan.
translations.sv: Min bror sover när det regnar.
translations.da: Min bror sover, når det regner.
translations.ja: 雨が降ると、弟は寝ます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying the noun.
Common noun serving as the head of the noun phrase.
Finite verb in third person singular present indicative.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a temporal clause.
Finite verb in third person singular present indicative.

I call you when I finish.
We leave when it starts to rain.
My brother sleeps when it rains.
